name: component_refresh_summary
primary_question: What bounded component refresh posture is represented by the reviewed aoa-sdk reference chain without letting stats become refresh truth or maintenance authority?
derivation_rule: derive one committed reference snapshot from reviewed aoa-sdk example drift hints and followthrough decisions while keeping owner validation and runtime receipts stronger
owner_truth_inputs: aoa-sdk authored component drift hint examples
authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner repo refresh law, owner validation, and real regeneration evidence.
